name: The soldier in the mine
short_description: The soldier in the mine is an interesting 2D platformer. In this game, to move from one cave to another. But you will interfere with obstacles.
detailed_description:
The soldier in the mine is an interesting 2D platformer. In this game, to move from one cave to another. But you will interfere with obstacles.

Key features:

- 1215 achievements
- 15 exciting levels
- Medium complexity
- Nice design
